name: Style
description: Prose voice, register, and motifs align with style guardrails. Visual/aesthetic cues align with style. The Player-Narrator remains in-voice.

rubric.instructions: Evaluate voice and style consistency. Read sections for tone coherence and alignment with established guardrails.

criteria.name: voice_consistency
criteria.description: Prose voice maintains consistent register across sections. No jarring tone shifts.

bad: Suddenly shifts from formal to casual

criteria.name: motif_coherence
criteria.description: Recurring motifs are threaded consistently. Aesthetic patterns align across content.

criteria.name: pn_voice_alignment
criteria.description: Player-Narrator phrasing matches agreed register and character.

failure_guidance: Run a Style Tune-up loop for tone wobble. Move over-exposition to codex; keep player surface lean. Coordinate with Style Lead for voice corrections.
